title: ImagineFun Add-Ons
description: Mods to improve your experience on Imagine Fun (IP: mc.imaginefun.net), a Disneyland Minecraft server. All mods are client side improvements and bug fixes to enhance gameplay.
body:
This is a collection of mods used to improve the experience of playing on **Imagine Fun** (IP: `mc.imaginefun.net`), a Disneyland Minecraft server. All mods are client side improvements and bug fixes to enhance gameplay. 

Questions can be directed to [discord.gg/disneyland](https://discord.gg/disneyland).

## Contents:
- ImagineFunutils
- Voxy
- CommandKeys
- freelook
- ShulkerBoxTooltip
